title: McCarthy Tétrault named Real Estate Firm of the Year by Chambers Canada
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault named Real Estate Firm of the Year by Chambers Canada
Toronto, September 17, 2019 – McCarthy Tétrault was named Canada’s top real estate firm at the Chambers Canada Awards 2019 held tonight in Toronto.
“This recognition demonstrates clients’ trust in McCarthy Tétrault to deliver innovative strategies that respond to market transformation, helping them achieve business objectives and drive growth,” said Bill McCullough, McCarthy Tétrault’s National Practice Group Leader, Real Property and Planning. “We are proud to offer clients a nationally integrated platform to develop effective solutions and capitalize on opportunities in Canada and abroad."
“Firm of the Year” awards are based on the research for the 2020 edition of C hambers Canada: Canada's Leading Lawyers for Business and reflect a law firm’s pre-eminence within key practice areas. They also reflect notable achievements over the past 12 months including outstanding work, impressive strategic growth and excellence in client service.
McCarthy Tétrault boasts Canada’s largest commercial real estate practice. Covering nearly all aspects of real estate, we are the first call for financial institutions, governments, private companies, REITs, hospitality groups and hotels, retail chains, and more. We also specialize in advising domestic and international pension, private equity and sovereign wealth funds on their real estate activities in Canada. To learn more about McCarthy Tétrault’s Real Property & Planning Group, click here .
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, advising on large and complex assignments for Canadian and international interests. The firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London, UK.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
- William D. McCullough Counsel People.Offices.Singular Toronto
People.Offices.Singular Toronto
